name: Christmas Tree
desc: A classic evergreen tree decorated with ornaments and a star for Christmas.

name: Evergreen Tree
desc: A plain evergreen tree, often used to represent winter or an undecorated Christmas tree.

name: Glowing Star
desc: A bright star commonly used as a tree topper or representing the Star of Bethlehem.

name: Sparkles
desc: Twinkling light symbols used to represent holiday magic and tree lights.

name: Bell
desc: A golden bell often used as a decoration on trees or associated with sleigh bells.

name: Candle
desc: A lit candle used for traditional Christmas tree lighting and holiday warmth.

name: Yarn
desc: Sometimes used to represent DIY ornaments or cozy tree garlands.

name: Ribbon
desc: A pink or red bow often used to decorate Christmas trees and wreaths.

name: Lollipop
desc: A candy treat often used as a tree decoration in place of candy canes.

name: Log
desc: Representing the firewood or the base of a real Christmas tree.
